CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #218.

Anthony D. Agpaoa, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Enriqueta Chavez, who was placed under oath and examined.
Esperanza Chavez was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant Fortunato.
Cross-complaint dismissed today, October 7, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, October 7, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Enriqueta Chavez, and against the Defaulted Defendant, Fortunato Stefano as follows:

Damages/Principal - $12,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00,, for a total judgment in the amount of $12,500.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anthony D. Agpaoa, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Enriqueta Chavez, who was placed under oath and examined.
Miranda Agpaoa was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant Fortunato Stefano.

Due to incomplete documentation in the case file, the Court cannot proceed with today's default prove-up hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to October 7, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
